mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.content AS content, c.is_teacher AS isTeacher, c.is_deleted AS isDeleted, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.loginID AS loginID, u.name AS writerName FROM qna_comment c JOIN tb_userinfo u ON c.loginID = u.loginID WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_comment (post_id, content, is_teacher, is_deleted, created_at, loginID) VALUES (#{postId}, #{content}, #{isTeacher}, 'N', NOW(), #{loginID})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
